actionUnits.condition: AttachToElevator (GUID: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) is attached to Elevator with BoxCollider (isTrigger=1). OnTriggerEnter is automatically fired when a Rigidbody-equipped collider enters the trigger. However, the scene MonoBehaviour settings show 'player' is null (fileID: 0), and the script checks 'if (gameObject == player)' instead of 'if (other.gameObject == player)', so no attach logic will execute unless 'player' equals the Elevator GameObject itself. This action represents entering the Elevator trigger volume to cover OnTriggerEnter.

AttachToElevator (GUID: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77) OnTriggerExit is automatically fired when the Rigidbody-equipped collider exits the Elevator's BoxCollider trigger. Given 'player' is null in scene and the script uses 'if (gameObject == player)', detach logic will not run. This action represents exiting the Elevator trigger volume to cover OnTriggerExit.
